Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. James Greenblatt, a pioneer in the field of integrative medicine who has been treating patients with eating disorders for many decades. His nutritional approach to psychiatry is revolutionary and has helped patients worldwide. He is the author of seven books, including Answers to Anorexia and Finally Focused: The Breakthrough Natural Treatment Plan for ADHD.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry
The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry
The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry

Video.summary: Want to keep the fires burning even when you’re too tired? Got questions about how long ED medications last? We break it down on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Video.summary: Keeping it sexy between the sheets is possible even without the big “O” and a man wonders if he can get intimate post-heart attack. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Professor Robert Thurman, the preeminent scholar and interpreter of Tibetan Buddhist philosophy for the modern world, who believes that Wisdom is Bliss and in fact, that’s the name of his latest book. Thurman is a very close friend of HH Dalai Lama and today he discusses deep ideas about mindfulness and presence and leads us on a joyful exploration into the nature of reality through Buddha’s threefold curriculum.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned infectious diseases specialist, pediatrician, parenting expert, speaker, and educator who discusses his latest book No Regrets Parenting: Turning Long Days and Short Years into Cherished Moments with Your Kids. He shares special keys for parents to guide children to live a life of wonder and contentment by conscious parenting.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting
The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting
The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews marital and family psychologist Dr. Michael Tobin who believes the secret to a happy, long-lasting relationship is mutual respect for one another. He’s been with his life partner, soulmate, and wife, Deborah, for 47 years, and in practice as a psychologist for more than 45 years. His most recent book, Riding the Edge, A Love Song to Deborah, chronicles his six-month transformative journey.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship
The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship
The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship

Video.summary: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett
World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett
World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Video.summary: This episode is all about HOW to demonstrate your worth and we've never seen so many people pour themselves out and completely rebuild like we saw in this episode.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 3

Image.alt: Play To Win- Episode 3
Play To Win- Episode 3
Play To Win- Episode 3

Video.summary: Getting attention for yourself or for a product is one of the most difficult things you will ever be faced with. We devised a unique marketing challenge unlike any of the previous episodes.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 4

Image.alt: Play To Win- Episode 4
Play To Win- Episode 4
Play To Win- Episode 4

Video.summary: Prostate cancer is the most common cancer in men. But there is a great deal of misinformation about treatments, causes and even screening. Find out the truth from the expert in this program.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer
Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer
Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer

Video.summary: Arthritis is the most common cause of hip problems but overuse and injury can also lead to pain, stiffness, and weakness. We ask an expert about what you can do to feel relief.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief
Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief
Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief

Video.summary: We spend a third of our lives fast asleep, but it’s not always so easy to get there. We ask an expert about how you can get a good night’s rest.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Video.summary: Sun exposure increases your risk of skin damage. We break down these common skin issues and what you can do about them.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin
Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin
Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin

Video.summary: It’s often difficult to talk about mental illness with a child or teenager. We talk to an expert to help guide you through the conversation.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health
Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health
Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health

Video.summary: Breast cancer researcher and physician talks about the latest therapies used to treat breast cancer and the advances that are bringing hope and healing to millions of people because of clinical trials.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Video.summary: Celebrity hypnotist Tim Shurr helps you unlock happiness and shed anxiety. Shari tests her hypnotizability, and the story of a woman who took back her mental health by empowering women worldwide. Plus, live from Heartfulness headquarters in India.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Unlocking Happiness

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Unlocking Happiness
Good Morning Joy - Unlocking Happiness
Good Morning Joy - Unlocking Happiness

Video.summary: 1963 Playboy Icon and Cosby Survivor, Victoria Valentino, shares her journey of overcoming unimaginable circumstances leading her to activism and purpose. Plus, one man's heroic efforts to save a tiny, unconscious life, and fun street interviews from NYC.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Video.summary: 3x GRAMMY winner, J. Ivy, shares his transformation from a shy kid to a spoken word powerhouse. J. Ivy performs. Plus, a story about a bus driver who made a first grader's day, street interviews from NYC, and Daaji discusses the soul's evolution.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Video.summary: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.
Video.title: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Image.alt: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Video.summary: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.
Video.title: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Image.alt: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Video.summary: Have you wondered how to biohack your health as a woman? Taking control to live your best life is what we dive into in this episode with guest Aggie Lal.
Video.title: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Image.alt: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Video.summary: Jennifer shares that no matter what you experience, you get to decide how you react to these situations and what role you play in them.
Video.title: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Image.alt: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Video.summary: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.
Video.title: HEAL
